title: vendor containers/common@main

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vikas-goel* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **giuseppe** after the PR has been reviewed. You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @giuseppe` in a comment when ready. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Hi @vrothberg ,

I noticed that IgnorePlatform variable was removed from containers/common (https://github.com/containers/common/pull/664). However, it is being referred in containers/buildah and containers/podman repos.

When I am trying to vendor containers/common (mainly for https://github.com/containers/common/pull/678) into containers/podman, the build is failing due to the missing variable.

I am unable to proceed with https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10911 due to the issue. How can this be fixed?

Thanks for the ping.

https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10848 is taking care of doing the changes.  Currently we are blocked since we first need to update the images used in CI.  Once https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10848 is merged, you can update this PR.
